untranslatable_reason: Broadening top pattern detection requires visual/structural analysis of trend-line boundaries and pattern formation across multiple bars. This cannot be expressed using only allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Previous Bar, Returns, Bar Props). The pattern requires identifying diverging highs and lows which would need custom pattern recognition logic. Used Donchian channels as a proxy for breakout detection, but this does not capture the broadening formation requirement.
translation_notes: Signal uses CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction with regime-specific failure rates (bear market down: 3%/23%/45% for 5%/10%/15% targets). Exits use ±15% return targets based on average_decline_pct. Donchian channels approximate trend-line boundary crossovers but do not replicate true broadening top pattern detection. Author-silent fields (bull success rate, average rise %) prevent complete parametrization. Regime filtering would need external market regime detection.
